jp.text: ダァロォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォォ
jp.literal: You're welcome to praise me too!

1023063961.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
1023063961.transcript: We should name that attack! Any ideas?

jp.text: どうだユーステス！今の連携は！
jp.literal: How was it, Eustace? That teamwork just now!

1024672314.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
1024672314.transcript: So, I've been meaning to ask... how the heck do you surf on a spear?

jp.text: ところでさ、あの槍に乗るヤツってどうやってんだ？
jp.literal: By the way, how the heck does that guy on the spear do it?

jp.text: もっと褒めてもいいぞ！
jp.literal: You can praise me all you want!

jp.text: いい連携だったぞ、団長！

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!

1045303812.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1600_2
1045303812.transcript: It wasn't supposed to end up this way!

jp.text: こんなはずじゃなかったんだけどなぁ
jp.literal: I didn't expect this to happen...

jp.text: いけるぞ！押して押して押し抜くんだ！
jp.literal: I can do this! Push, push, push it!

1046394155.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
1046394155.transcript: Take it from me! Don't get carried away!

jp.literal: Everyone! Don't let your guard down!

1047645009.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
1047645009.transcript: Eh... maybe we should play it safe.

jp.text: くっ…少し慎重に行った方がいいか…
jp.literal: Hmph. Maybe I should've been a bit more careful.

1049338018.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
1049338018.transcript: I know, I know! Focus, B! Focus!

jp.text: わかってるって！集中集中！

1049825460.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_buff_D_PL1600
1049825460.transcript: You always make the right play!

1051470522.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
1051470522.transcript: You've got my full support, Rolan!

jp.text: 私はローランを信じる！
私の全力を見せてやる！
jp.literal: I'll show you my full power!

1056248020.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_buff_C_PL2700
1056248020.transcript: Get a load of this, Eustace!

1062497212.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
1062497212.transcript: The real Fyurakin didn't seem this weird!

jp.text: いや、こいつは本物のフラカンじゃない！
jp.literal: No way... this guy's a real pro!

1073591904.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
1073591904.transcript: What the heck! Those bullets came out of nowhere!

jp.text: びっくりしたー！急に弾丸が飛んでくるもんだから！
jp.literal: You startled me! I mean, bullets are suddenly flying everywhere!
